narrative:
Coshocton County has 21,533 registered voters, with 54.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.6 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.4% of registrants.
